---
name: Feature request
about: Surface a feature you'd like before opening a PR
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Problem**
The user-visible problem you'd like solved. Concrete is better than
abstract.

**Proposed approach (optional)**
If you have one. The maintainer may choose a different shape — the
"open an issue first" rule is to align on shape before code lands.

**Why now**
Optional. Helps with prioritisation.
